subject: [RFC PATCH 5/7] mm: Make /proc/pid/smaps use the new generic pagewalk API

reviews.author: Oscar Salvador
reviews.summary: Reviewer noted that the patch is incomplete regarding shmem swap accounting and mentioned they are working on a fix offline.
reviews.raw_body:
Yes, sorry, that is one of those parts which is incomplete.
I am already working on that offline, but did not have the time to
prepare it for this one.


-- 
Oscar Salvador
SUSE Labs

2026-04-13.patch_summary: This patch updates /proc/pid/smaps to use a new generic pagewalk API, replacing custom handling for shared memory swap accounting. The old code efficiently accounted swapped-out shmem pages using specialized functions, but the new API lacks this capability, requiring changes to ensure accurate swap counting.
